{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Noroloth’s castle
| introduced = Dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The inside of [[Noroloth’s castle]] was ravaged by a battle against a [[Monarch]] intruder.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c10">''Dreadgod'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
